title: Liberty Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Liberty Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
